zh.St Endellion, Cornwall, England: 英國可瓦爾聖 恩德利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry de Bodrugan於1263年出生在英國可瓦爾時，他的父親Roger de Bodrugan19歲，母親Isolda Pyn19歲。他於1287年與Sybil de Mandeville在英國英格蘭可瓦爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1307年被列為mp for cornwall。他去世於1308年在英國英格蘭可瓦爾享年45歲。

zh-hans.St Endellion, Cornwall, England: 英国可瓦爾聖 恩德利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry de Bodrugan于1263年出生在英国可瓦爾时，他的父亲Roger de Bodrugan19岁，母亲Isolda Pyn19岁。他于1287年与Sybil de Mandeville在英国英格兰可瓦爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1307年被列为mp for cornwall。他去世于1308年在英国英格兰可瓦爾享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry de Bodrugan was born in 1263, in Cornwall, England, his father, Roger de Bodrugan, was 19 and his mother, Isolda Pyn, was 19. He married Sybil de Mandeville in 1287, in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. In 1307, at the age of 44, his occupation is listed as mp for cornwall. He died in 1308, in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry de Bodrugan est né en 1263, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, Roger de Bodrugan, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Isolda Pyn, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Sybil de Mandeville en 1287, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. En 1307, à l’âge de 44 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est mp for cornwall. Il est décédé en 1308, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry de Bodrugan 1263 in Cornwall, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger de Bodrugan 19 und seine Mutter Isolda Pyn 19. Er hat 1287 in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom Sybil de Mandeville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1307, als er 44 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als mp for cornwall aufgeführt. Er starb 1308 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry de Bodrugan è nato il nel 1263 nel Cornwall, England, il suo padre, Roger de Bodrugan, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Isolda Pyn, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Sybil de Mandeville nel 1287, nel Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Nel 1307, all'età di 44 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come mp for cornwall. Morì nel 1308, nel Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry de Bodruganが1263年にイギリスコルンワルで生まれた時，父Roger de Bodruganは19歳，母Isolda Pynは19歳であった。1287年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルでSybil de Mandevilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。1307年，44歳の時，職業はmp for cornwallと記録されている。彼は1308年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルで45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry de Bodrugan(이)가 1263년 영국 코른월에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger de Bodrugan(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Isolda Pyn(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1287년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월에서 Sybil de Mandeville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1307년, 44세의 나이로 그의 직업은 mp for cornwall이었다. 그는 1308년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry de Bodrugan nasceu em 1263, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger de Bodrugan, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Isolda Pyn, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Sybil de Mandeville em 1287, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Em 1307, com 44 anos, sua profissão aparece como mp for cornwall. Ele faleceu em 1308, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry de Bodrugan родился в 1263 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, его отцу по имени Roger de Bodrugan было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Isolda Pyn, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Sybil de Mandeville в 1287 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. В 1307 году, в возрасте 44 лет,  он работал по профессии mp for cornwall. Он умер в 1308 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 45 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry de Bodrugan nació en 1263, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger de Bodrugan, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Isolda Pyn, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Sybil de Mandeville en 1287, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. En 1307, a la edad de 44 años, su ocupación registrada era mp for cornwall. Murió en 1308, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 45 años.
